coverage_note: The bundled ESR1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ESR1 estrogen receptor transcriptional control, chromatin binding, endocrine signaling, and anti-estrogen response biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000091831: ESR1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ESR1 findings should be read against estrogen receptor transcriptional control, chromatin binding, endocrine signaling, and anti-estrogen response biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs2234693 (ESR1 PvuII marker) is curated as a ESR1 marker for Endocrine-responsive breast cancer context, Estrogen signaling and reproductive tissue biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

ESR1 ligand-binding-domain resistance model is curated as a ESR1 marker for Endocrine-responsive breast cancer context, Estrogen signaling and reproductive tissue biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
